title: City of Oakland Homeless Abatement Policies

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All written policies, memorandum, regarding the abatement of homeless encampments in effect between January, 1 2025 and January 1 2026

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robbie Powelson

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

communications.subject: RE: [EXTERNAL] Georgia Open Records Act Request: Open Records Request: Georgia Power
communications.communication:
Good Morning,

The Municipal Clerk’s Office is in receipt of your Open Records Request of Tuesday, May 26, 2026 (see below), in which you requested in part the following information be provided:


                A copy of purchase order number 52524873, dated 6/26/2025 from Georgia Power for $6,120.

A copy of all agreements with Georgia Power related to purchase order number 52524873.



Please be advised that the Municipal Clerk’s Office is not the custodian of the information you are seeking to obtain.  You will need to contact the Department of Procurement via email at openrecordsprocurement@atlantaga.gov<mailto:openrecordsprocurement@atlantaga.gov> or

by telephone at 404-546-1078
Thank you.

Patricia Marshall

[A picture containing text, porcelain  Description automatically generated]

Patricia Marshall / Office of Municipal Clerk/ Atlanta City Council
Atlanta City Hall / 55 Trinity Avenue, SW / Suite 2700 / Atlanta, GA  30303
Office  404.330.6032/ Email  pcmarshall@atlantaga.gov<mailto:pcmarshall@atlantaga.gov>

STATEMENT OF CONFIDENTIALITY: The information contained in this electronic message and any attachments are intended for the exclusive use of the addressee(s) and may be confidential or privileged. If you are not the intended recipient, you do not have permission to read, print, copy or distribute this message or any attachments. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender by return e-mail or contact the sender if a phone number was provided and permanently delete this message and any attachments from your system.

communications.subject: RE: [EXTERNAL] Georgia Open Records Act Request: Open Records Request: Georgia Power
communications.communication:
Good afternoon,

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act (O.C.G.A. § 50-18-70 et seq.), the City of Atlanta Department of Procurement acknowledges receipt of your request submitted via email on Wednesday, May 27, 2026 at 8:52 AM. Please accept this as the Department’s statutorily required response.


In your request of May 27, 2026, you asked for the following:


A copy of purchase order number 52524873, dated 6/26/2025 from Georgia Power for $6,120.- Attached

A copy of all agreements with Georgia Power related to purchase order number 52524873.- Please be advised that DOP has no responsive agreement or contract document related to your request for Georgia Power. The procurement was processed as a small purchase in accordance with the City of Atlanta Procurement Code. Under the City’s procurement regulations, a small purchase is a procurement made for goods or services that falls within the monetary threshold established for streamlined purchasing procedures and does not require a formal written contract or competitive sealed solicitation process. As such, no formal agreement was executed for this purchase.

Accordingly, there are no additional responsive documents in DOP’s custody and control related to a contract or agreement for this procurement.

Please let us know if you have any additional questions.

[cid:image002.png@01DCEEBB.AACA6C40]

communications.subject: [Records Center] Welcome to the Records Center!
communications.communication:
Dear e e, 
 
Thank you for registering with the City of Chamblee Records Center. 
 
Your Login ID is:  212194-00330255@requests.muckrock.com 
 
If you did not submit your request through the public portal but are receiving this e-mail, an account has been created for you where you can track and monitor the status of your request, and receive any documents in response to your request. 
 
 
If you have never used this system or cannot remember your password you may request a temporary password here: Request Temporary Password (https://u8387778.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.VEsWrlMiJDg0mXafq1mEXfRK4N-2FsUbYHvInb3YXEt-2FfNYMI2bOR4UBagFUg2qwaT2j20G4T6dcH6PRqMDQtpfl69TFfpLGfXLkwMkMhC1ek-3D2mfG_dYOUFsNNzAl16GFzIHh-2BrDfbSLwzUWrSiymSDHmFg805qBQyPJ2pcxInTl50iXTGNJqDKgP7t3HD5CXdO1xjS-2F5aYgKf6uXnrP8r1WMprNQH8piCTx1-2FjlaCs9migj3y8E1Na-2BMlURpLvPvKw6zsJSToougi-2BxcvZX4dr7A8KyAieoSq67ruE5RfafZ74t4wJBbfxjJ5ARvo-2FGLGjjHsvZGUBbxTVDhaa7nOhbziDSg-3D)

communications.subject: Public Records Request :: R017811-052726
communications.communication:
Dear e e: 
Thank you for your interest in public records of City of Chamblee. Your request has been received and is being processed. Your request was received in this office on 5/27/2026 and given the reference number R017811-052726 for tracking purposes. Records Requested: To Whom It May Concern: 

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records: 

A copy of purchase order number REQ11929, dated 4/30/2024 from Georgia Power for $43,851.46. 

A copy of all agreements with Georgia Power related to purchase order number REQ11929. 

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes. 

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not. 

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires. 

Sincerely, 

Upload documents directly: https://www.muckrock.com/respond/2300294/ 
Your request will be forwarded to the relevant department(s) to locate the information you seek and to determine the volume and any costs associated with satisfying your request. You will be contacted about the availability and/or provided with copies of the records in question. 
 
By submitting this request you agree to pay any copying and/or administrative costs incurred in fulfilling your requests to the extent permitted by Georgia law. Such costs may include copying charges of $.10 per page and administrative charges for search, retrieval, and other direct administrative costs, such administrative charges not to exceed the salary of the lowest paid full-time employee who, in the discretion of the custodian of the records, has the necessary skill and training to perform the request. (The requester is not charged for the first fifteen minutes of time). Any request over $25.00 will be provided an estimate of cost. 
You can monitor the progress of your request at the link below and you'll receive an email when your request has been completed. Again, thank you for using the Public Records Center. 
City of Chamblee 
To monitor the progress or update this request please log into the Public Records Center (https://u8387778.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.VEsWrlMiJDg0mXafq1mEXfRK4N-2FsUbYHvInb3YXEt-2Ff7a18vzF-2F1vo-2FSDQPDYDRNvp6-2Ba42OftmvfPyuT6oE13aIvd8guwQowbdxbuxvDOY-3Ddi3K_dYOUFsNNzAl16GFzIHh-2BrDfbSLwzUWrSiymSDHmFg805qBQyPJ2pcxInTl50iXTGBK9hIBY6mjC-2B69EZQneY4bhKhSBu3Fa4J9D5wal5sIo1V4mgBulqZ14yYWZm1INu89oGMdUX6zslpjixbGVsebTVRz0jj-2FItdEZd4zSk4fPKz-2FAr30lw9aFqNETBcmK-2BAFVU7CffPLJqzi6VbdVnY5crRtXPSXMMFSqEUN6jvwImMpbq2edjTKFHK-2FDxPDOzRK2C4MwjQWU1GYWQBloC1dBCln-2FU6P8BSYw2R5bChbzJyz-2BRc-2BWZJrxEot3-2F5Nf8DSz-2FlueeKRPBc-2B5oreMqJQo8LLnMp5q5F6lj5CUxBWwqaFT1cHTlAC0OMW2uDJmF)

communications.communication:
--- Please respond above this line --- 

RE: PUBLIC RECORDS REQUEST of May 27, 2026, Reference # R017811-052726. 
Dear e e, 
The City of Chamblee received a public information request from you on May 27, 2026. Your request mentioned: “To Whom It May Concern: 

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records: 

A copy of purchase order number REQ11929, dated 4/30/2024 from Georgia Power for $43,851.46. 

A copy of all agreements with Georgia Power related to purchase order number REQ11929. 

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes. 

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not. 

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires. 

Sincerely, 

Upload documents directly: https://www.muckrock.com/respond/2300294/” 
The City of Chamblee has reviewed its files and has located responsive records to your request. Please log in to the Public Records Center at the following link to retrieve the appropriate responsive documents. 
Public Records Request - R017811-052726 
If you have any questions, or wish to discuss this further, please contact me. 
Sincerely, 
Erin Barnes 
Assistant Finance Director 
Finance
